detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Takeda.openTrading() (Takeda.sol#573-599):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (Takeda.sol#583)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Takeda.sol#585)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Takeda.sol#585)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (Takeda.sol#595)
	Takeda.tradingOpen (Takeda.sol#283) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Takeda.openTrading() (Takeda.sol#573-599)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Takeda.openTrading()](Takeda.sol#L573-L599):
	External calls:
	- [uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH())](Takeda.sol#L583)
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](Takeda.sol#L585)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](Takeda.sol#L585)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [tradingOpen = true](Takeda.sol#L595)
	[Takeda.tradingOpen](Takeda.sol#L283) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Takeda.openTrading()](Takeda.sol#L573-L599)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Takeda._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Takeda.sol#441-503):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Takeda.sol#485)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Takeda.sol#517-529)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Takeda.sol#491)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (Takeda.sol#567)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (Takeda.sol#501)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Takeda.sol#655)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Takeda.sol#635)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Takeda.sol#637)
	Takeda._rOwned (Takeda.sol#243) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Takeda._takeTeam(uint256) (Takeda.sol#649-657)
	- Takeda._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Takeda.sol#631-645)
	- Takeda.balanceOf(address) (Takeda.sol#359-363)
	- Takeda.constructor() (Takeda.sol#309-323)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (Takeda.sol#501)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Takeda.sol#663)
	Takeda._rTotal (Takeda.sol#259) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Takeda._getCurrentSupply() (Takeda.sol#755-765)
	- Takeda._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Takeda.sol#661-667)
	- Takeda.constructor() (Takeda.sol#309-323)
	- Takeda.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Takeda.sol#415-423)

detectors.description: Takeda.openTrading() (Takeda.sol#573-599) ignores return value by uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Takeda.sol#585)

	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
